rawAssistant: There's been whispers about a faint glow on the north road, but that's all I've heard so far. Some folks say it's just the mist burning off, but others claim to have seen lights in the distance. I'll need more information before I can offer any solid advice. The Hollowfen folk seem to be taking it in stride, though – one side of the road shows fresh signs that deserve a careful look.
